description_long: This house is a long, narrow structure with a distinctly irregular, organic footprint, resembling a rustic or naturalistic dwelling. The roof appears to be a single, continuous surface with a gentle slope, lacking any visible overhangs or eaves. There is a small, raised section near one end, possibly representing a chimney or a minimal entryway feature. The exterior is uniformly clad in a light, beige material that mimics unfinished wood or natural fiber, giving the house a raw, earthy appearance. No windows or doors are clearly visible, suggesting a minimalist or primitive design. The overall form is low-profile and blends into the ground, evoking a rural or vernacular architectural style.
description: A long, low-profile house with an irregular, naturalistic shape and a light beige exterior, featuring a small raised section near one end. The structure has a rustic, unfinished appearance with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house's elongated, narrow shape and the small raised section near one end are most prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the broad, flat expanse of the roof and the organic, uneven edges of the structure.
description_view_2: The irregular, sloping roof and the subtle elevation changes along the length of the house are visible here.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the tapering end of the house and the minimal, unobtrusive raised feature.
attribute_entryway_design: minimal, small raised section possibly indicating a simple entryway, no visible steps or decorative elements
